title: SimpleTotemCounter
description: SimpleTotemCounter shows how many times people have popped totems. You can see it on nametags, in tab, and as your own totem count on HUD. All of it is toggleable in Mod Menu.
body: SimpleTotemCounter is a lightweight PvP utility mod for Fabric 1.21.11 that tracks totem pops in real time and displays clean -X counters on player nametags and in the tab list. It also includes an optional inventory totem HUD counter, reset controls, and configurable behavior for death/leave cleanup through Mod Menu, while keeping gameplay-focused visuals minimal and performance friendly.
